{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Consultant’s Guild archives
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultant’s Guild archives]] contain a recovered fragment of a third-century magistrate’s tablet.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
